headline: Cognex Well-Poised to Ride Next AI Wave on OneVision and SLX
summary: CGNX leans into AI with its OneVision platform and embedded tools to scale machine vision across logistics and electronics while targeting stronger margins.

headline: Bloomberg 500 (B500) Index Adds Eleven Securities Following March Reconstitution
summary: Bloomberg Indices announced the following changes to the Bloomberg 500 (B500) Index effective prior to the open of trading on Thursday, March 12, 2026, to coincide with the March reconstitution of the index. The B500 contains the 500 most highly capitalized US companies weighted by float market cap, reflecting a market capitalization of $58.19 trillion.

headline: Zebra Technologies Introduces "Orchestrated Care" Approach to Enhance Patient Care at HIMSS26
summary: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill., March 05, 2026--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), a global leader in digitizing and automating workflows to deliver intelligent operations, today introduced Orchestrated Care, its visionary framework designed to help healthcare organizations provide intelligent visibility, empower teams and optimize operations.
